name: diffusion_lm_mercury_K20
description: Mercury-class diffusion language model with K=20 denoising iterations, d_model=4096, activations quantized to 8 bits. Only the final denoised output is logged; all K-1 intermediate denoising states are unlogged. The min cut is the single first unlogged denoising edge and gives epsilon_state^UB = 32768 bits independent of K.
notes: Intermediate steps 5..18 are elided for brevity; a full spec enumerates all K-1 edges.
The min cut is any single edge s_{k-1} -> s_k, giving epsilon_state^UB <= b * d = 8 * 4096 = 32768 bits.
The full chain sum is Sigma c_e = K * b * d = 20 * 32768 = 655360 bits (a loose upper bound; the min-cut corollary is tighter).
